from pydantic import BaseModel

class UserPayload(BaseModel):
    id: str
    email: str

def process_external_webhook(payload: dict):
    # Mapping to a boundary/adapter model first
    user = UserPayload(
        id=payload["data"]["user"]["id"],
        email=payload["data"]["user"]["email_address"]
    )
    # ... business logic uses 'user' model
